mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activities WHERE status = 'ActivityEnded'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_hours), 0) FROM users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM activity_participants
SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM activities GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT student_no as studentNo, username as name, COALESCE(total_hours, 0) as hours FROM users WHERE total_hours > 0 ORDER BY total_hours DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DATE(start_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM activities WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(start_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE(a.start_time) as date, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.student_no) as count FROM activity_participants ap INNER JOIN activities a ON ap.activity_id = a.id WHERE a.start_time >= #{startTime} AND a.start_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(a.start_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT DATE(end_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM activities WHERE status = 'ActivityEnded' AND end_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(end_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT u.grade as name, COUNT(DISTINCT u.student_no) as userCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.activity_id) as activityCount, COALESCE(SUM(u.total_hours), 0) as totalHours, COALESCE(AVG(u.total_hours), 0) as averageHours FROM users u LEFT JOIN activity_participants ap ON u.student_no = ap.student_no WHERE u.grade IS NOT NULL AND u.grade != '' GROUP BY u.grade ORDER BY totalHours DESC

SELECT u.college as name, COUNT(DISTINCT u.student_no) as userCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.activity_id) as activityCount, COALESCE(SUM(u.total_hours), 0) as totalHours, COALESCE(AVG(u.total_hours), 0) as averageHours FROM users u LEFT JOIN activity_participants ap ON u.student_no = ap.student_no WHERE u.college IS NOT NULL AND u.college != '' GROUP BY u.college ORDER BY totalHours DESC

SELECT u.clazz as name, COUNT(DISTINCT u.student_no) as userCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.activity_id) as activityCount, COALESCE(SUM(u.total_hours), 0) as totalHours, COALESCE(AVG(u.total_hours), 0) as averageHours FROM users u LEFT JOIN activity_participants ap ON u.student_no = ap.student_no WHERE u.clazz IS NOT NULL AND u.clazz != '' GROUP BY u.clazz ORDER BY totalHours DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT college FROM users WHERE college IS NOT NULL AND college != '' ORDER BY college
SELECT DISTINCT grade FROM users WHERE grade IS NOT NULL AND grade != '' ORDER BY grade DESC
SELECT DISTINCT clazz FROM users WHERE clazz IS NOT NULL AND clazz != '' ORDER BY clazz
